value: iOS 17 fallback can fail in three known cases: (1) Lists/Forms may keep their opaque background — must add explicit `.scrollContentBackground(.hidden)`; (2) custom toolbar backgrounds (e.g. `.toolbarBackground(customColor, for: .navigationBar)`) conflict with the hidden-toolbar approach and need an `if #available(iOS 18.0, *)` guard; (3) complex NavigationStack transitions may briefly flicker. Document any new iOS 17-affecting change in IMPORTANT.md's "iOS 17 Troubleshooting" section. iOS 18+ does not have these caveats — it's the supported "optimal" path.
